parts.text: A human reviewer reads intent. An agent at three a.m. has no reviewer — so the gate is the reviewer.
One command wires it up. And agents don't get the same bar humans do.

mergegate init detects your stack and writes the config and the CI gate. Then watch: the same change, with a failing optional check. A human ships it. The very same change from an agent is blocked — because an autonomous agent must clear every gate.
mergegate. Per-repo governance for the age of agent PRs. From deemwar.

captions.text: mergegate init — config + CI gate, stack auto-detected.
Same change · human: optional lint waived → ✔ PASS.
Same change · agent: every gate required → ✘ BLOCKED.
